visuals.title: Agent-Environment Interaction Loop
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Agent-Environment Interaction Loop
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">The Nature of Environment</text>
  
  <!-- Central Environment Circle -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="60" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Environment
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Physical Factors -->
  <rect x="70" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Physical
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Biological Factors -->
  <rect x="70" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Biological
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Social Factors -->
  <rect x="250" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Social
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Cultural Factors -->
  <rect x="250" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cultural
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connection Arrows -->
  <path d="M140,100 C170,120 190,150 190,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M140,250 C170,230 190,200 190,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M280,100 C250,120 230,150 230,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M280,250 C250,230 230,200 230,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
